_description: Manifest of /cartoons/ Editorial Panels for the weekly Buffer cross-post pipeline. post-editorial-panel.js picks one unposted item per run, cross-posts FB+IG with the caption, records to data/editorial-panels-posted.json.

panels.subject: Parmigiano-Reggiano
panels.caption:
A single wheel of Parmigiano-Reggiano, aged thirty-six months, weighs approximately one hundred ninety pounds.

The wedding party had requested two.

panels.subject: Atlantic Giant pumpkin
panels.caption:
The 1973 grand champion at the Topsfield Fair weighed in at one thousand two hundred forty-seven pounds.

Six men were required to move it from the scale to the truck.

panels.subject: Natural-draft cooling tower
panels.caption:
A natural-draft cooling tower at full load releases approximately twenty-five thousand pounds of water vapor per minute.

The photographer below is five feet ten.

panels.subject: General Sherman sequoia
panels.caption:
The General Sherman, calculated by volume, is the largest single-stem tree on Earth.

Twenty-five feet across at the base.

panels.subject: Cologne Cathedral bell
panels.caption:
The Petersglocke at Cologne Cathedral weighs twenty-four tons.

It is rung on five occasions per year.

panels.subject: Royal Wedding cake (1947)
panels.caption:
The 1947 Royal Wedding cake weighed five hundred pounds.

It was shipped from Glasgow in seven separate crates.

panels.subject: Klencke Atlas
panels.caption:
The Klencke Atlas, presented to Charles II in 1660, measures six feet tall when opened.

It is consulted twice a decade.

panels.subject: John Deere combine harvester
panels.caption:
A modern combine harvester can clear a quarter section of wheat in a single afternoon.

The header alone weighs twelve thousand pounds.

panels.subject: Boardwalk Hall pipe organ
panels.caption:
The Boardwalk Hall Auditorium Organ has thirty-three thousand one hundred fourteen pipes.

The longest is sixty-four feet.

panels.subject: Boeing GE90-115B jet engine
panels.caption:
The General Electric GE90-115B has an intake fan twelve feet five inches in diameter.

It is the largest commercial jet engine in production.

panels.subject: Caterpillar 797F mining tire
panels.caption:
A sixty-three-inch off-the-road tire weighs approximately twelve thousand pounds.

Replacement requires a crane.

panels.subject: Hoover Dam
panels.caption:
Hoover Dam contains six million six hundred thousand tons of concrete.

The construction crew of 1933 was estimated at twenty-one thousand.

panels.subject: Ever Ace container ship
panels.caption:
The Ever Ace, classed Megamax-24, displaces two hundred thirty-five thousand tons fully loaded.

She carries twenty-four thousand of these.

panels.subject: USDA Prime brisket
panels.caption:
A USDA Prime full packer brisket can exceed twenty pounds prior to trim.

Some butchers will not sell one without a forklift waiver.

panels.subject: Jamon Iberico de Bellota
panels.caption:
A whole jamon iberico de bellota cures for four years and weighs eighteen pounds.

The reception had requested twelve.

panels.subject: 36-inch pizza pie
panels.caption:
A thirty-six inch pizza pie weighs approximately fourteen pounds.

Most restaurants require one hour notice.

panels.subject: Liebherr 81 K.1 tower crane
panels.caption:
A Liebherr 81 K.1 has a thirty-six meter jib at radius.

The counterweight is calculated to seven decimal places.

panels.subject: Nebuchadnezzar wine bottle
panels.caption:
A Nebuchadnezzar holds the equivalent of twenty standard bottles.

It is named for the king who built the Hanging Gardens.

panels.subject: Granite curling stone
panels.caption:
A regulation curling stone weighs forty-four pounds.

It is quarried from Ailsa Craig, an uninhabited island in the Firth of Clyde.

panels.subject: Saturn V rocket
panels.caption:
The Saturn V stood three hundred sixty-three feet tall and produced seven and a half million pounds of thrust at liftoff.

The Junior Cataloguer maintains it counts as a vehicle.

panels.subject: Wind turbine blade
panels.caption:
A modern utility-scale wind turbine blade measures one hundred ninety feet.

Each blade requires a permit, an escort, and a route survey.

panels.subject: Ohio-class submarine
panels.caption:
An Ohio-class ballistic missile submarine displaces eighteen thousand seven hundred fifty tons submerged.

The sail alone is forty feet tall.

panels.subject: Stonehenge sarsen
panels.caption:
Each sarsen at Stonehenge weighs approximately twenty-five tons.

They were transported, by means still debated, from the Marlborough Downs.

panels.subject: Hughes H-4 Hercules (Spruce Goose)
panels.caption:
The Hughes H-4 Hercules has a wingspan of three hundred twenty feet.

It was constructed entirely from birch and flew exactly once, for one minute, in 1947.

panels.subject: Nimitz-class aircraft carrier deck
panels.caption:
A Nimitz-class aircraft carrier flight deck measures 1,092 feet, or four and a half acres.

It is shorter than the ship it sits on.

panels.subject: Big Ben (the Great Bell of Westminster)
panels.caption:
The Great Bell of Westminster, more commonly known as Big Ben, weighs thirteen and a half tons.

It has been ringing since 1859.

panels.subject: Antonov An-225 Mriya
panels.caption:
The Antonov An-225 had six engines, twin tails, and a wingspan of two hundred ninety feet.

Only one was ever built.

panels.subject: Mount Rushmore
panels.caption:
Each face on Mount Rushmore measures sixty feet from chin to crown.

Workers used dynamite for ninety percent of the carving.

panels.subject: Statue of Liberty torch
panels.caption:
The Statue of Liberty's index finger measures eight feet.

Her sandal is twenty-five feet long.

panels.subject: USDA Prime beef short rib
panels.caption:
A USDA Prime beef plate short rib weighs between two and three pounds before cooking.

The bone is non-negotiable.

panels.subject: Supertanker stockless anchor
panels.caption:
A modern stockless ship anchor for a 350,000-ton tanker weighs twenty-three tons.

The chain link alone weighs sixty pounds.

panels.subject: Great Pyramid of Giza
panels.caption:
The Great Pyramid of Giza contains 2.3 million limestone blocks.

Each weighs an average of two and a half tons.

panels.subject: Bagger 288 bucket-wheel excavator
panels.caption:
The Bagger 288 bucket-wheel excavator weighs thirteen thousand five hundred tons and moves under its own power.

Its top speed is one third of a mile per hour.

panels.subject: Record bluefin tuna
panels.caption:
The 2019 Toyosu auction record was set by a 612-pound bluefin tuna.

It sold for three million one hundred thousand dollars.

panels.subject: Uluru
panels.caption:
Uluru rises one thousand one hundred forty-one feet above the desert floor.

Geologists estimate the rock continues for a further mile and a half below it.
